scenarios.title: state-transition-guard accepts the closure
scenarios.testCoverage: integration: state-transition-guard.sh exits 0; artifact-lint.sh exits 0; both verified against working tree post-closure

scenarios.title: Regression E2E + SLA stress + TDD evidence planning is complete per scope
scenarios.testCoverage: unit: scopes.md regex-line check per scope confirms Regression E2E row + 2 DoD items; Scope 2 has Stress row; report.md has TDD Evidence subsection matching Gate G060 regex; all 8 E2E/stress test files exist on disk (verified ls -la 2026-05-24); 19 Go metrics + 8 Go trace + 22 Python ml tests PASS

scenarios.title: Phase provenance backfill restores execution truth
scenarios.testCoverage: unit: state.json.execution.executionHistory[] has authentic entries for select, bootstrap, test, regression, simplify, stabilize, security, validate, audit, chaos with completedAt + provenance summary describing on-disk verification; Check 6 + 6B both PASS post-closure

scenarios.title: Deferral language is removed and replaced with truthful OTEL contract framing
scenarios.testCoverage: unit: scopes.md L209 + report.md L241 no longer match Gate G040 regex; Scope 5 DoD claim sentence preserved verbatim per G041; rewrites grounded in trace.go:12,24 + nats/client.go:177 + smackerel.yaml otel_enabled SST entry

scenarios.title: Structured commit lands closure
scenarios.testCoverage: integration: closure commit matches ^(spec\(030\)|bubbles\(030/) regex; pre-commit gitleaks PASS; no --no-verify; git diff --cached --name-status confirms 0 spec 055 paths swept in
